complaint_readiness.detail: A complaint draft already exists. Compare it against the supported facts, requested relief, and any remaining proof gaps before treating it as filing-ready.
complaint_readiness.recommended_action: Refine the existing draft and reconcile it with the support review.

ui_feedback.draft_excerpt:
Jordan Example brings this retaliation complaint against Acme Corporation.

Jordan Example alleges that they Reported discrimination to HR.

After that protected activity, Jordan Example experienced Threatened termination and then terminated two days later.

The timeline shows that Reported discrimination on March 8, threat on March 9, termination on March 10.

As a result, Jordan Example suffered Lost wages, benefits, and emotional distress.

Requested relief includes: Back pay; Compensatory damages; Injunctive relief.

Working case synopsis: Jordan Example alleges retaliation after reporting
ui_feedback.summary: The exported complaint artifact was analyzed to infer which UI steps may still be too weak, hidden, or permissive for a real complainant.

ui_suggestions.recommendation: The exported complaint looks coherent enough to keep the current UI flow, but continue validating navigation, evidence support, and clarity through Playwright.
ui_suggestions.title: Preserve the current filing flow
